zh.Jülich, Rheinland, Prussia, Germany: 海因里希_海普洛文次爾利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottfried von Jülich於1300年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次爾利時，他的父親Gerhard V. von Jülich49歲，母親Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot20歲。他於大約1330年與Elisabeth von Kleve結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年5月3日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 波海姆享年35歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 艾尤斯吉陳巴德 明斯特費爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gottfried von Jülich于1300年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次爾利时，他的父亲Gerhard V. von Jülich49岁，母亲Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot20岁。他于大约1330年与Elisabeth von Kleve结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1335年5月3日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 波海姆享年35岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 艾尤斯吉陳巴德 明斯特費爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Gottfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from god, got ‘god’ + frid ‘peace’; borne by the 13th-century poet Gottfried von Strassburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Gottfried von Jülich was born in 1300, in Jülich, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Gerhard V. von Jülich, was 49 and his mother, Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot, was 20. He married Elisabeth von Kleve about 1330. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 3 May 1335, in Bergheim, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 35, and was buried in Bad Münstereifel, Euskirchen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gottfried von Jülich est né en 1300, à Jülich, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Gerhard V. von Jülich, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Kleve environ 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1335, à Kreis Bergheim, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Bad Münstereifel, Kreis Euskirchen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.Stiftskirche, Bad Münstereifel, North Rh: Bad Münstereifel, Kreis Euskirchen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Gottfried von Jülich 1300 in Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerhard V. von Jülich 49 und seine Mutter Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot 20. Er hat um 1330 Elisabeth von Kleve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Mai 1335 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Kreis Bergheim, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Bad Münstereifel, Kreis Euskirchen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried von Jülich è nato il nel 1300 nel Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Gerhard V. von Jülich, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Kleve circa 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 3 maggio 1335, nel Kreis Bergheim, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Bad Münstereifel, Kreis Euskirchen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.Jülich, Rheinland, Prussia, Germany: プレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズジuリチ
ja.lifeSummary: Gottfried von Jülichが1300年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズジuリチで生まれた時，父Gerhard V. von Jülichは49歳，母Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschotは20歳であった。約1330年にElisabeth von Kleveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年5月3日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス バーグヘイムで35歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス エウスキルチェンバド ムuンステレイフエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Stiftskirche, Bad Münstereifel, North Rh: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 우스커천 바드 u스테레이프
ko.lifeSummary: Gottfried von Jülich(이)가 1300년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 ju리치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerhard V. von Jülich(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1330년 Elisabeth von Kleve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 5월 3일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 버게이임에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 우스커천 바드 u스테레이프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried von Jülich nasceu em 1300, em Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Gerhard V. von Jülich, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Kleve aproximadamente 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1335, em Kreis Bergheim, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Bad Münstereifel, Kreis Euskirchen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.Stiftskirche, Bad Münstereifel, North Rh: бад мuнстирифел, крис эускирчэн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottfried von Jülich родился в 1300 г. в местности джuлич, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Gerhard V. von Jülich было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Kleve около 1330 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 3 мая 1335 г. в местности крис биргим, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности бад мuнстирифел, крис эускирчэн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.
